Event: The Arcane Adventure
Event Date: 14/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: A329
Orbit of Fate

Triggers: Once in a while

Voltage spike
The fighter launches a lightning bolt at a random enemy fighter. The lightning bounces between all enemy fighters. Upon hitting, the lightning deals 400000 pure damage to the targets and reduces their physical and magical armor by 20% for 4 seconds. Additionally, the lightning has a 50% chance to apply an electric pulse to the target for 4 seconds. Each time the fighter uses an ability while under the electric pulse, they are struck by a lightning discharge, dealing 350000 magical damage to them and all enemy fighters in a small radius around them. All affected fighters are also stunned for 2 seconds. Moreover, the primary target of the ability has their physical and magical armor reduced by 15% for 4 seconds and they receive 250000 magical damage over 4 seconds.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
